description_long: This is a large, wooden storage box with a rustic, weathered appearance, featuring vertical planks and reinforced edges. The box is adorned with a prominent white cross on the top surface, possibly indicating medical or hazardous contents. Two of its visible sides display a bold black skull and crossbones symbol, warning of danger or toxicity. There are visible red stains resembling splatters, adding to its hazardous or abandoned look. One side of the box has its wooden planks partially detached, suggesting it can be opened or is damaged. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for heavy-duty storage or transport in urban or industrial settings.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with a white cross on top and skull-and-crossbones symbols on the sides, featuring red stains and partially detached planks.
description_view_0: A wooden box face with vertical planks, red stains, and a white cross on the top; no symbols or open panels visible.
description_view_1: The box face displays a black skull and crossbones symbol, red stains, and the white cross on top; a partially open side panel is visible.
description_view_2: The box is seen from the back with vertical planks, red stains, and a partially detached side panel leaning outward.
description_view_3: Another skull and crossbones symbol is visible on the box face, with red stains and the partially open side panel more prominent.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: painted skull and crossbones, painted white cross
